name: Suspicious Amount of Files Deleted on the Same Machine
notes: This rule triggers when a suspicious amount of files are deleted from a large number of different folders. This could indicate an attempt to disrupt services or hide traces of an attack.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Deleted
when at least 25 events are seen with the same Machine Identifier (custom) and different File Directory (custom) in 5 minutes
thresholds: when at least 25 events are seen with the same Machine Identifier (custom) and different File Directory (custom) in 5 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Amount of Files Deleted on the Same Machine on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Deleted
AND when at least 25 events are seen with the same Machine Identifier (custom) and different File Directory (custom) in 5 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious Amount of Files Deleted on the Same Machine
Event description: Detects a suspicious amount of files deleted.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
